tasks.label: Deploy New DLL
tasks.command: taskkill /F /IM iisexpress.exe /T 2>$null; Start-Sleep 2; Copy-Item 'i:\entire system - boulevard\SourceCode of ADmin\Boulevard\Boulevard\obj\Debug\Boulevard.dll' 'i:\entire system - boulevard\SourceCode of ADmin\Boulevard\Boulevard\bin\Boulevard.dll' -Force; Write-Host "DLL Size: $((Get-Item 'i:\entire system - boulevard\SourceCode of ADmin\Boulevard\Boulevard\bin\Boulevard.dll').Length)"; Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Program Files\IIS Express\iisexpress.exe' -ArgumentList '/path:"i:\entire system - boulevard\SourceCode of ADmin\Boulevard\Boulevard" /port:5000' -WindowStyle Minimized; Write-Host 'IIS Express started'
